text.title: Ad Creation and Launch
text.summary: Ad component requirements, minimum creative set, UTM parameters, and learning phase rules.

list.item: Primary text: 125 characters shown without truncation; additional text behind "See more"
CTA button: required — Learn More, Sign Up, Shop Now, Get Quote, etc.
Image or video: must match placement spec (see instagram-ads for specs)

rule.statement: Upload at least 3 ad variations per ad set covering different formats (image, video, carousel) — never launch with a single creative.
rule.rationale: Single-creative ad sets cannot be optimized; Meta needs variation to identify which creative, format, or angle resonates with a given audience segment.

rule.statement: Add UTM parameters to all ad destination URLs before launch — never rely on Meta's internal attribution alone.
rule.rationale: Meta attribution and GA4 attribution diverge by 20-50% due to view-through vs click-through differences; UTMs provide the GA4 ground truth needed for cross-platform comparison.

example.note: Meta supports dynamic UTM parameters using {{campaign.name}}, {{adset.name}}, {{ad.name}} placeholders.

rule.statement: Do not edit ad sets, targeting, bids, or budgets during the first 3-7 days — any significant edit resets the learning phase counter.
rule.rationale: The learning phase requires ~50 conversions to complete; editing forces a restart, extending the period of unstable, high-CPA delivery.
